messages.content:
Create the file db/migrations/0042_add_index.sql with exactly this content, using write_file:

```
CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_orders_tenant_created
    ON orders (tenant_id, created_at DESC)
    WHERE status IN ('pending', 'processing');
ANALYZE orders;
```

messages.content:
Create the file k8s/deployment.yaml with exactly this content, using write_file:

```
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: billing-worker
  namespace: payments
spec:
  replicas: 4
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: billing-worker
```
